_comment: Personalization signal for the generator. weights: more = more posts. contentMix: how many of each flavor per run. researchSources: where to look for papers/releases. focusRecency biases toward this-week AI.
researchSources: Hugging Face Daily Papers (huggingface.co/papers) — prefer highly-upvoted / trending
arXiv cs.AI, cs.CL, cs.LG — only notable work from recognized groups
Official lab blogs: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Meta AI, Mistral, DeepSeek, Qwen, xAI, Microsoft Research, Allen AI (AI2)

qualityBar.papers: Only GENUINELY notable papers: trending on Hugging Face daily papers, from recognized labs/authors, or with a clearly significant, well-supported result. Reject obscure or low-signal preprints, survey-spam, purely incremental tweaks, and anything without real results or code.
qualityBar.news: Only SIGNIFICANT releases from a credible PRIMARY source (official announcement / lab blog). Major model, framework, product, or capability launches. Reject rumors, speculation, minor version bumps, and marketing fluff.
qualityBar.verify: Before finalizing a paper/release post, re-read the actual source (WebFetch the arXiv abstract or official announcement) and confirm every claim, number, name, and date matches it. Drop anything you cannot ground in the source.
qualityBar.preferSkipOverWeak: Quality beats hitting the count. If no paper or release in the window clears the bar, SKIP that flavor this run rather than forcing a weak one. Always ship at least the concept post. Never fabricate or pad.
